name: Minodas
bio: Minodas, the beastly businessman, is another figure Aluccard has had the displeasure of crossing paths with. A venture capitalist by trade, Minodas offers "the devil's deal" to those he sees as vulnerable. Most people see only a man; Aluccard is under no such illusion.

Minodas serves the lord of the underworld, handing out deals he knows he'll be able to collect on -- and what he's collecting is nothing less than souls. He has no morals, and he'll offer his deal to almost anyone foolish enough to take it.
